title: Modular Hud
description: Modular Hud Elements mod for minecraft
body:
# Modular Hud

Requires [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

Customizable GUI (default y)
![customizable gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eb31215229dfea6e3b00bce1183bc8c64d69302.png)

Toggable and Customizable Modules

![Coordinate Module](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78249d386e3d5611ad6db0f382313c779714d245.png)
![To-do Module](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/301b4a32d1f6c375154beec6b7a5e9445a4202c0.png)
![Game Info Module](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/073d81bfbbf7de871ffeba061e350669a7fd21b9.png)
